stonetop.summary: A Forge Lord who Changed into a hoard-brooding, fire-breathing wyrm.

system.concept: A Forge Lord who Changed into a hoard-brooding, fire-breathing wyrm.
system.description: Picture a long and sinuous beast with serpentine scales, curled upon a pile of treasure beneath a layer of long-cold soot, bits of rusted steel protruding from its flesh, smoke drifting from its nostrils. Hard to believe this thing was once a Maker. But it was. A draventao is what remains of a Forge Lord that survived the Cataclysm by Changing — letting its inner fire burn until its heart was a blackened coal of wrath, shedding its beautiful form, bolting living metal onto its twisted flesh, then eating the servants who did the work. Now it mostly sleeps, for years at a time, brooding on its hoard, drawn forth only by hunger or by vengeance upon some brazen thief. Each draventao has its own particular strength, metal augmentation, and a single thing it still remembers.
